title: IEC 62304 Software Requirement
description: Field-aligned with crates/trustsc-governance/src/lib.rs::Requirement, so a future serde-based JSON export from ComplianceProgram matches this schema without redesign.

id.description: Corresponds to trustsc_governance::RequirementId — a non-empty free-text identifier, e.g. 'REQ-EEG-ALERT-LATENCY'.

source_clause.description: A citation key in the docs/governance/citation-convention.md format, e.g. 'IEC 62304:2006 §5.2 Software development planning'.

verification_intent.description: How this requirement is intended to be verified — corresponds to VerificationCase.method/evidence at the point a VerificationCase referencing this requirement is created.
